summary: Phase 1.7 leakage workflow mock fixtures: typed LeakageWorkflowTask loaders for all four task types with evidence bundles, root cause, execution plans, and PII-safe validation. Persona aligned (buyer_cancellation_cluster, return_window_policy). No API or DB calls.

interfaceChanges.description: Returns all four LeakageWorkflowTask fixtures with stable IDs.
Returns a single leakage workflow task by task ID.
Fail-fast schema and PII validation for all fixture sets.

mappings.criterion: Fixture module under leakage-workflow with typed schemas matching canonical entities
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_leakage_workflow_fixtures.test.ts::includes required schema fields on every fixture

mappings.criterion: loadLeakageFixtures returns complete records for all four leakage task types
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_leakage_workflow_fixtures.test.ts::returns exactly four tasks covering all leakage task types

mappings.criterion: loadLeakageWorkflowTask returns a single task by stable ID
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_leakage_workflow_fixtures.test.ts::returns a single task by stable ID

mappings.criterion: leakage-persona task cards aligned with fixture task IDs and renamed types
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_leakage_workflow_fixtures.test.ts::leakage-persona task IDs and types match workflow fixtures

mappings.criterion: Cancelled-order rows present for buyer_cancellation_cluster evidence
Unit test fixture loaders return required schema fields per task type
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_leakage_workflow_fixtures.test.ts::includes required schema fields on every fixture

mappings.criterion: Unit test all evidence bundles use masked buyer IDs only
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_leakage_workflow_fixtures.test.ts::masks buyer IDs in all evidence bundles and forbids raw PII keys

mappings.criterion: No TikTok API calls and no Postgres writes
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_leakage_workflow_fixtures.test.ts::has no TikTok API or Postgres imports in fixture module entrypoint
